title: Set 2: A Busy Day at the Farm 🚜
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: My uncle Harry lives on a farm. Last summer, I stayed there for a week. Every morning, we woke up
at 5 o'clock. My first job was to

the chickens and the cows. They were always very hungry!

In the afternoon, Uncle Harry let me sit on his big green
like carrots and potatoes for our lunch. Everything was very fresh. Suddenly, the sky turned grey and there were many dark
. We ran inside just before the rain started. I learned that life on a farm is hard work but very fun!

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A visit to the city museum

explanations_vi: Mỗi sáng họ thức dậy sớm (early) lúc 5 giờ.
Công việc đầu tiên là cho (feed) gà và bò ăn.
Chú Harry cho tôi ngồi trên xe máy cày (tractor) xanh to.
Họ đến khu vườn rộng để hái rau củ (vegetables) như cà rốt, khoai tây.
Bầu trời xám và xuất hiện nhiều đám mây (clouds) đen trước khi mưa.
Tiêu đề A đúng nhất: câu chuyện kể về việc giúp đỡ ở nông trại.
